amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 37 — paragraph 1
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 37 — paragraph 1

## Text proposed by the Commission

1. The Commission shall, where necessary, investigate all cases where there are reasons to doubt whether a notified body complies with the requirements laid down in Article 33 .

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1. The Commission shall, where necessary, investigate all cases where there are reasons to doubt the competence of a notified body or the continued fulfilment by a notified body of the applicable requirements and responsibilities .
commission_text: 1. The Commission shall, where necessary, investigate all cases where there are reasons to doubt whether a notified body complies with the requirements laid down in Article 33 .
parliament_text: 1. The Commission shall, where necessary, investigate all cases where there are reasons to doubt the competence of a notified body or the continued fulfilment by a notified body of the applicable requirements and responsibilities .
